---
title: "assignment-6-Adamlajonuhu"
author: "ADAM LAJO NUHU"
date: "2026-03-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


### Question 1: Average departure delay
```{r}
library(DBI)
library(duckdb)

con <- dbConnect(
  duckdb::duckdb(),
  dbdir = "data/flights.duckdb",
  read_only = TRUE
)

avg_delay <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT ROUND(AVG(dep_delay), 2) AS avg_departure_delay
  FROM flights
  WHERE dep_delay IS NOT NULL
")

print(avg_delay)

dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
```

## Interpretation:
The average departure delay for flights in the dataset is 12.64 minutes, meaning that, on average, flights depart about 12.64 minutes later than their scheduled departure time.
